description.ko: 보이지 않는 주파수가 침묵의 유리 위에 빠르고 미니멀한 리듬을 그린다.
description.en: Invisible frequencies write a fast, minimal rhythm across silent glass.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization rendered as a silent close-up of a matte black glass pane covered with hairline tension traces, as if invisible sound is sketching directly across the surface. Thin #4169E1 royal-blue waveform strokes run in parallel lanes, then jump into fast #FF4500 orange angular tremors where sharp transients pass through. Small #FFD700 gold phase nodes cling to only a few crossing points, while rare #32CD32 lime markers flicker like measured frequency ticks. The composition avoids any speaker, performer, core, sphere, corridor, or architectural monument: only vibrating minimal lines, offset echoes, clipped harmonics, and clean negative space revealing resonance in silence. Rhythmic, high-contrast, low-particle, precise soundwave abstraction with crisp edges and rapid visual tempo.
